summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Onboarding web app - both backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Tab counters initially show '0 из 0' on page load, then update to correct values after user interaction
ui_bugs.current_behavior: Tasks tab shows 'Задачи 0 из 0' initially, then updates to 'Задачи 2 из 5' after tab switching

passed_tests: Backend: All 10 API endpoints working (100% success)
Login: Carousel with 3 slides displays correctly
Dashboard: Header with logo, user name 'Иван Семёнов', avatar, logout button
Services: All 8 service cards display with proper icons
Tasks: 5 tasks display with checkboxes, task completion toggle works
Learning: 6 courses/modules display with completion status
Documents: 10 documents display with correct file type icons
Navigation: Tab switching between Tasks, Learning, Documents works
Logout: Successfully redirects to login page

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - Minor UI timing issue with tab counters

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Tab counters should load initial values immediately on dashboard load instead of showing '0 из 0' temporarily
